mapper.sql: id, building, room_number, capacity, equipment, location, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM yx_classroom WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_classroom SET building = #{building}, room_number = #{roomNumber}, capacity = #{capacity}, equipment = #{equipment}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_classroom SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
